prompt: How many people use Firefox on Android?

assertions.name: corrects_terminology
assertions.description: Addresses that BigQuery tracks clients/profiles, not people/users

assertions.name: uses_aggregates_table
assertions.description: Uses active_users_aggregates as the source-of-truth table

assertions.name: correct_android_app_name
assertions.description: Filters by correct Android app_name (Fenix or similar)
